title: Clippy 2
description: Clippy catches redundant code, shadowing issues, and suggests simplifications.
instructions: Fix the Clippy warnings in this code.
hints: Use `option.is_some()` instead of `if let Some(_) = option`.
If you just need to check if an Option has a value, use is_some().
The reference/dereference pattern is redundant - just use the value directly.
explanation: Clippy identifies unnecessary complexity: `if let Some(_) = option` can be simplified to `option.is_some()` when you don't need the value. Creating a reference just to immediately dereference it is redundant. These cleanups make code more readable and idiomatic.
